author: intelgaoxiong
title: hello_classification_c crashes with ld.so dl-sort-maps DFS assertion on ARM64
primary_error: Inconsistency detected by ld.so: dl-sort-maps.c: 241: _dl_sort_maps_dfs: Assertion `rpo_head == rpo' failed!
root_cause: glibc dynamic linker assertion failure during shared library unload on ARM64. The hello_classification_c binary ran successfully but the dynamic linker (ld.so) triggered an internal consistency check failure in _dl_sort_maps_dfs at process exit, resulting in exit code 127. This is an infrastructure/environment issue unrelated to the PR changes (NPUW MoE Router isolation removal).
